hooks.command: ROOT="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git -C "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]:-$0}")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)}" && lw=$(grep "^LOOP_WEIGHT:" "$ROOT/.sessions/session_tokens.md" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); lw=${lw:-0}; if [ "$lw" -gt 50 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "[C0.5-REQUIRED] LOOP_WEIGHT=$lw > 50 — emit [compact-required] as FIRST line · write compact_state.md · STOP new work" >&2; elif [ "$lw" -gt 30 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "[C0.5-warn] LOOP_WEIGHT=$lw > 30 — emit [compact-warn] as FIRST line (Skill · Remaining · Resume — all 3 mandatory)" >&2; fi; exit 0
